summary: Tested Iteration 40 features: ProductCard redesign, ProductsPage filters, and StoresListPage with SVG map. All requested features are working correctly. ProductCards display all content without overflow. Certification filters and price range inputs work. SVG Spain map displays in map view.

minor.issue: Search parameter is sent by frontend but not handled by backend - search functionality not implemented
Sort parameter is sent by frontend but not handled by backend - sort functionality not implemented

integration_issues.issue: Search input sends parameter to backend but backend doesn't filter results
Sort dropdown sends parameter to backend but backend doesn't sort results

issues: AI chat widget covers part of the filter sidebar - known minor issue as mentioned in requirements
Some test products have broken image placeholders (TEST_New Organic Product) - test data issue, not a bug

passed_tests: ProductCard: All content fits within card (no overflow/cutoff)
ProductCard: Image visible
ProductCard: Product name visible with line-clamp for long names
ProductCard: Trust signals visible (rating, review count, units sold)
ProductCard: Certification badges visible (vegan, gluten-free, sugar-free, organic)
ProductCard: Price visible
ProductCard: Add to Cart button visible
ProductCard: Buy Now button visible
ProductCard: Low Stock badge visible ('Only 3 left')
ProductCard: Out of Stock badge visible ('Sold Out')
ProductsPage: Certification filters work - clicking Vegan reduces products from 13 to 5
ProductsPage: Certification filter highlights with amber background when selected
ProductsPage: Active filter tags appear at top when filters applied
ProductsPage: Price range inputs work - €10-€15 filter reduces products to 4
ProductsPage: Clear Filters button works
StoresListPage: Grid view shows store cards (2 stores)
StoresListPage: Map view toggle button present ('View map')
StoresListPage: SVG Spain map displays with correct viewBox (0 0 400 350)
StoresListPage: Spain outline path renders correctly
StoresListPage: Store cards visible in map view sidebar
StoresListPage: Country filter present
StoresListPage: Region filter present
StoresListPage: Search input present
action_items: OPTIONAL: Implement search parameter handling in /api/products endpoint
OPTIONAL: Implement sort parameter handling in /api/products endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.js: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes, compact design with stacked buttons
ProductsPage.js: Certification filters properly highlight when selected, price range inputs work correctly
StoresListPage.js: SVG Spain map is a simple outline as expected, not a full interactive Leaflet map
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified: 1) ProductCard redesign working - compact design with all elements visible (image, name, rating, certifications, price, buttons). 2) ProductsPage certification filters working - Vegan filter reduces products from 13 to 5, filters highlight with amber background. 3) ProductsPage price range inputs working - €10-€15 filter shows 4 products. 4) StoresListPage SVG map working - Spain outline displays in map view. Note: Search and sort parameters are sent to backend but not implemented - this is a minor issue not affecting core functionality.

product_card_design.details: Compact design with all elements visible: image, name (line-clamp-2), trust signals, certification pills, price, stacked buttons. Low stock and out of stock badges display correctly.

certification_filters.details: Clicking checkboxes filters products. Vegan filter reduces from 13 to 5 products. Selected filters highlight with amber background. Active filter tags appear at top.

price_range_inputs.details: Min/Max price inputs work. €10-€15 range shows 4 products. Price filter tag appears at top.

search_input.details: Search input is present and sends parameter to backend, but backend doesn't filter results. Frontend UI works correctly.

stores_grid_view.details: Grid view shows 2 store cards with proper layout.

stores_map_view.details: SVG Spain outline displays with viewBox='0 0 400 350'. Store cards visible in sidebar. Toggle between grid and map view works.
